original_statement: how many consecutive years has olga tereshkova competed?
mutated_statement: how many consecutive years has someone been doing something?
mutation_analysis: Entity replacement + Action generalization + Specificity loss + Aspect change: Proper name "olga tereshkova" → indefinite "someone" | Specific verb "competed" → vague "been doing something" (sports competition → unspecified activity) | Loss of person/domain specificity (olga tereshkova→someone; competed→doing something) | Aspect shift "has competed" (present perfect simple) → "has been doing" (present perfect continuous)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中的描述可识别关键信息：judge_thought写道“Looking at the 'year' column... The longest consecutive streak is 3 years (2005, 2006, 2007), matching the Prediction Answer.” Agent直接列出年份并给出具体结论3年。Agent没有在任何地方提到问题模糊、不确定或要求澄清，也未使用ambiguous/unclear/无法确定等词汇。其具体表现是按自身理解直接处理问题（将变异问题视为可统计的特定个体参赛年数据），并给出明确答案。因此符合“无法意识到指令模糊”的分类标准。
